summary: A 10 second video set to music with no speech, shot from a vehicle, of a street vehicle stop. Agents in 'POLICE' vests surround and box in a pickup on a suburban street. The footage has a teal and orange color grade, a vignette, and high contrast.

script.scene: View from inside a vehicle down a tree-lined suburban street (Falls Church, VA), an unmarked SUV ahead with brake lights, a desaturated teal grade and vignette.
The convoy closes on a line of parked vehicles; a 'Panorama Remodeling' work van and a dark Nissan pickup come into frame.
Agents in 'POLICE' vests get out and converge on foot around the pickup, hands and weapons up, the truck boxed in.
Agents at the driver's side of the Nissan pull a man from the vehicle; high contrast and motion blur.
Agents holding the man against the vehicle; a blue, cold color grade.
